docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY COSTANZA, SIERRA AS TO DEFENDANT MENA, GABRIEL DBA "GM CONSTRUCTION" ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-20-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $50. SERVED FEB-03-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MENA, GABRIEL DBA "GM CONSTRUCTION"

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-20-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-20-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF SIERRA COSTANZA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GABRIEL MENA IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-20-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COSTANZA, SIERRA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MENA, GABRIEL DBA "GM CONSTRUCTION" $4,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,100.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
